events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a torque sequence violation (spiral/star from center) during in-progress work. This is a sequence violation that must be corrected before continuing. The work is non-compliant because the torque sequence pattern was violated.

Decision: fail (non-compliant sequence violation)
Risk: medium-high - improper torque sequence can lead to uneven clamping, gasket failure, or joint failure
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: non-compliant (the fastening work is non-compliant)
Percent complete: estimate maybe 40%
Findings: torque sequence pattern violated
Actions: stop, back off all fasteners, redo with correct sequence
Rationale: torque sequence must follow OEM pattern to ensure even clamping load
References: OEM/engineering specs
